citation.description: tracker_head_sha() now accepts ignore_untracked=True; when set, uses --untracked-files=no so untracked artifacts from crashed processes no longer trigger store-read-failure

criteria.criterion: Root-cause bug: untracked files in the shared .tickets-tracker worktree cause tracker_head_sha() to raise store-read-failure, collapsing review-plan to INDETERMINATE for every ticket machine-wide

citation.description: collect_plan_relation_snapshot(ticket_id, repo_root=repo_root, ignore_untracked=True) called with ignore_untracked=True; comment explicitly documents the rationale

criteria.criterion: The preflight collect_plan_relation_snapshot() call in review-plan execution passes ignore_untracked=True so untracked files in the shared tracker do not block review for unrelated tickets

citation.description: When ignore_untracked=True, --untracked-files=no suppresses only untracked files; modified/staged files still show in git status --porcelain output and ls-files -u still checks for unmerged conflicts

criteria.criterion: Tracked dirty state (modified/staged/unmerged files) still causes store-read-failure (the fix only relaxes the untracked check, not the full dirty check)
